command: echo '=== REAL ACME.JSON (in Docker volume) ===' && ls -la /var/lib/docker/volumes/n8n-traefik_traefik_data/_data/ && wc -c /var/lib/docker/volumes/n8n-traefik_traefik_data/_data/acme.json && echo '' && echo '=== DOMAINS IN ACME ===' && python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/var/lib/docker/volumes/n8n-traefik_traefik_data/_data/acme.json')); [print(f'  {c.get(\"domain\",{}).get(\"main\",\"?\")}: sans={c.get(\"domain\",{}).get(\"sans\",[])}') for r in d.values() if isinstance(r,dict) for c in r.get('Certificates',[])]" 2>/dev/null || echo 'parse failed' && echo '' && echo '=== FIX dashboard.yml YAML error ===' && cat /opt/n8n-traefik/dynamic/dashboard.yml && echo '' && echo '=== REMOVE webhook.marbomebel.ru reference ===' && grep -rn 'webhook.marbomebel.ru' /opt/n8n-traefik/dynamic/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'not found in dynamic configs'
intent: Check real acme.json in Docker volume, diagnose dashboard.yml YAML error
